topic.what: Seven cross-domain detection techniques for prompt injection ported from forensic linguistics, materials science, network security deception, bioinformatics, mechanism design, epidemiology, and compiler theory
topic.how: Each technique produces a detection signal architecturally independent of regex pattern matching and transformer classification
topic.why_matters: Recent adaptive-attack studies show >50% bypass rates against existing defenses; mechanistically independent signals force adversaries to evade multiple orthogonal invariants simultaneously

characteristics.what_it_measures: Detection accuracy on paraphrased attacks in deepset benchmark
characteristics.evidence: Table 1: 14 TP/60 positive samples, zero FP

characteristics.what_it_measures: Proportion of attacks detected on deepset
characteristics.evidence: Recall improves from 1/60 to 14/60 attacks detected
characteristics.context: d028 local sequence alignment detector on deepset

characteristics.what_it_measures: Benign samples incorrectly flagged on deepset
characteristics.evidence: Table 1: zero FP across all deepset configurations
characteristics.context: d028 achieves perfect precision on deepset

characteristics.what_it_measures: Detection accuracy on synthetic indirect-injection benchmark
characteristics.evidence: Stylometric detector lifts F1 from 0.889 to 1.000 on 80-sample synthetic set
characteristics.context: d027 stylometric discontinuity; synthetic benchmark has acknowledged self-evaluation risk
